a:["$","$Lc",null,{"toc":[{"depth":2,"url":"#deployment-planning-factor-analysis","title":"Deployment Planning Factor Analysis"},{"depth":2,"url":"#hardware-configuration-matrix","title":"Hardware Configuration Matrix"},{"depth":2,"url":"#performance-critical-path-optimization","title":"Performance Critical Path Optimization"},{"depth":3,"url":"#network-topology-optimization-highest-priority","title":"Network Topology Optimization (Highest Priority)"},{"depth":3,"url":"#storage-subsystem-tuning","title":"Storage Subsystem Tuning"},{"depth":3,"url":"#memory-management-strategy","title":"Memory Management Strategy"},{"depth":2,"url":"#network-design-reference-model","title":"Network Design Reference Model"},{"depth":3,"url":"#bandwidth-and-disk-ratio-relationship","title":"Bandwidth and Disk Ratio Relationship"},{"depth":2,"url":"#memory-configuration-calculator","title":"Memory Configuration Calculator"},{"depth":2,"url":"#storage-deployment-standards","title":"Storage Deployment Standards"},{"depth":3,"url":"#media-selection-criteria","title":"Media Selection Criteria"},{"depth":3,"url":"#file-system-configuration","title":"File System Configuration"},{"depth":2,"url":"#high-availability-assurance-measures","title":"High Availability Assurance Measures"}],"children":[["$","$Ld",null,{"children":"Production Environment Hardware Configuration Guide"}],["$","$Le",null,{"className":"mb-0","children":"RustFS is a high-performance distributed object storage system developed in Rust, suitable for massive unstructured data storage scenarios. This document provides comprehensive hardware selection and configuration guidance for production environment deployment."}],["$","div",null,{"className":"flex flex-row gap-2 items-center border-b pt-2 pb-6","children":[["$","$Lf",null,{"markdownUrl":"/installation/checklists/hardware-checklists.md"}],["$","$L10",null,{"markdownUrl":"/installation/checklists/hardware-checklists.md","githubUrl":"https://github.com/rustfs/docs.rustfs.com/blob/main/content/installation/checklists/hardware-checklists.md"}]]}],["$","$L11",null,{"children":[["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"deployment-planning-factor-analysis","children":"Deployment Planning Factor Analysis"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Before formally deploying RustFS, it's recommended to conduct 2-3 weeks of business research, focusing on evaluating the following dimensions:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Data Scale Analysis"}]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Initial Data Volume"}],": Accurately calculate effective data volume at production startup (recommended in TiB units), considering hot/cold data ratios"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Growth Trend Prediction"}],": Estimate data increments for the next 24 months based on business development plans (recommended quarterly growth rate model)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Object Scale"}],": Calculate total object count based on average object size (recommended 128 KB-1 MB range), note special optimization needed when exceeding 100 million objects"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"start":"2","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Business Characteristic Assessment"}]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access Patterns"}],": Distinguish read-intensive (such as content distribution) from write-intensive (such as log collection) scenarios"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Compliance Requirements"}],": Data retention cycles must comply with industry regulatory requirements (e.g., financial industry must retain for at least 5 years)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Multi-site Deployment"}],": Cross-regional deployment requires network latency assessment (recommended controlled within 50ms) and bandwidth cost evaluation"]}],"\n"]}],"\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16","\n","$L17","\n","$L18","\n","$L19","\n","$L1a","\n","$L1b","\n","$L1c","\n","$L1d","\n","$L1e","\n","$L1f","\n","$L20","\n","$L21","\n","$L22","\n","$L23","\n","$L24","\n","$L25","\n","$L26","\n","$L27","\n","$L28","\n","$L29","\n","$L2a","\n","$L2b","\n","$L2c","\n","$L2d","\n","$L2e","\n","$L2f","\n","$L30","\n","$L31","\n","$L32","\n","$L33","\n","$L34","\n","$L35","\n","$L36","\n","$L37","\n","$L38","\n","$L39"]}],"$undefined"]}]
3a:I["327bb606fa81",[],"CodeBlock",1]
3c:I["327bb606fa81",[],"Pre",1]
13:["$","ol",null,{"start":"3","children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Storage Architecture Design"}]}],"\n"]}]
14:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Bucket Planning"}],": Divide storage buckets by business units, single cluster recommended not exceeding 500 active buckets"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Disaster Recovery Strategy"}],": Choose dual-active architecture (recommended) or asynchronous replication based on data importance"]}],"\n"]}]
15:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"hardware-configuration-matrix","children":"Hardware Configuration Matrix"}]
16:["$","p",null,{"children":"Baseline configuration solutions based on stress test results:"}]
17:["$","div",null,{"className":"relative overflow-auto prose-no-margin my-6","children":["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Component"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Basic Environment"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Production Standard Configuration"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"High-Performance Configuration"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Node Count"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"4 nodes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8 nodes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"16+ nodes"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Storage Media"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"4× NVMe SSD"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"8×NVMe SSD"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"12×NVMe SSD"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Network Architecture"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dual 25GbE (link aggregation)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dual 100GbE"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"200GbE"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"CPU"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2×Intel Silver 4310 (16 cores)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2×AMD EPYC 7313 (32 cores)"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"2×Intel Platinum 8461Y (48 cores)"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Memory"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"64 GB DDR4-3200 ECC"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"256 GB DDR5-4800 ECC"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"512 GB DDR5-5600 ECC"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Storage Controller"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"HBA 9500-8i"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"HBA 9600-16i"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Dual controller redundant architecture"}]]}]]}]]}]}]
18:["$","p",null,{"children":["$","strong",null,{"children":"Important Deployment Principles:"}]}]
19:["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Adopt \"server farm\" mode, ensuring all nodes use identical hardware batches and firmware versions"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Network architecture must meet: leaf-spine topology + physically isolated storage network + dual uplink paths"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Recommend using 2U server models, single node recommended configuration of 12+ disk bays (based on actual hard disk count)"}],"\n"]}]
1a:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h2","id":"performance-critical-path-optimization","children":"Performance Critical Path Optimization"}]
1b:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"network-topology-optimization-highest-priority","children":"Network Topology Optimization (Highest Priority)"}]
1c:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Bandwidth Calculation"}],": Reserve 0.5 Gbps bandwidth per TB of effective data (e.g., 100 TB data needs 50 Gbps dedicated bandwidth)"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Latency Requirements"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Inter-node P99 latency ≤ 2ms"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Cross-rack latency ≤ 5ms"}],"\n"]}]
1d:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"storage-subsystem-tuning","children":"Storage Subsystem Tuning"}]
1e:["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Controller Configuration"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Enable read-ahead cache (recommended 256 MB+)"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Disable all RAID functions, use pass-through mode"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Regularly check BBU battery health status"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"SSD Parameters"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Reserve 20% OP space to improve durability"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Enable atomic write features (requires hardware support)"}],"\n"]}]
1f:["$","$L12",null,{"as":"h3","id":"memory-management-strategy","children":"Memory Management Strategy"}]
